more.title: CNN founder Ted Turner, has died at age 87
more.description: NEW YORK — Ted Turner, the brash and outspoken television pioneer who created a media empire and transformed the news business by creating CNN and introducing the 24-hour cable news cycle, died Wednesday. He was 87. more.title: Zimbabwe part of six-nation bid for 2028 Africa Cup of Nations: SA minister
more.description: JOHANNESBURG, South Africa – Zimbabwe is among six southern African countries that will join South Africa in bidding to co-host the 2028 Africa Cup of Nations (Afcon), South Africa’s sport, arts and culture minister Gayton McKenzie has announced.
